title: A Stage of Twilight
overview: When Barry receives fatal news, he makes a decision to rent a trailer home in the middle of the woods where he can die alone. As the days wind down to his departure, his wife Cora is driven to make a critical decision for them both.

trailers.title: Writer/Director Sarah T. Schwab kicks off the discussion about her new film A Stage of Twilight
